title: the pack
description: 'the pack' is a kitchen sink pack with the goal of providing new and interesting ways of gearing up before taking on powerful new enemies and bosses.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/ohRzeZ0.png)

**the pack** is a kitchen sink pack that aims to provide new threats to progression and new ways of dealing with those threats. Explore new biomes, structures, and even dimensions as you gear up and fight new mobs and bosses.

Another major focus of the pack is utilizing Create and Tetra to automate your base and tailor your gear to threats looming around every corner.

Adapt to any situation your journey demands with a plethora of different mods, or treat it like an expansion for vanilla MC!

# Modlist

All mods are sourced from Modrinth.
